/usr/bin/c++  -DSIMDE_X86_AVX_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_AVX_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_F16C_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_FMA_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_GFNI_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_MMX_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_PCLMUL_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_SSE2_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_SSE3_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_SSE_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_XOP_HAVE_COM_ -DSIMDE_X86_XOP_NATIVE -mno-avx512f -march=native -DSIMDE_X86_AVX2_NATIVE -DSIMDE_X86_VPCLMULQDQ_NATIVE -march=native  -pipe -fPIC -Wall -fno-strict-aliasing -rdynamic -Wno-packed-bitfield-compat -std=c++11  -O2 -g   -ggdb2 -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/home/zyzy/zy-OAI CMakeFiles/nr_prachsim.dir/openair1/SIMULATION/NR_PHY/prachsim.c.o CMakeFiles/nr_prachsim.dir/openair1/SIMULATION/NR_PHY/nr_dummy_functions.c.o CMakeFiles/shlib_loader.dir/common/utils/load_module_shlib.c.o -o nr_prachsim  -Wl,--start-group libUTIL.a libSIMU.a libPHY_COMMON.a libPHY_NR_COMMON.a libPHY_NR.a libPHY_RU.a libPHY_NR_UE.a libMAC_NR_COMMON.a libSCHED_NR_LIB.a libCONFIG_LIB.a -lz -Wl,--end-group -lm -lpthread common/utils/T/libT.a libITTI.a -ldl openair1/PHY/nr_phy_common/libnr_phy_common.a libPHY_COMMON.a common/utils/nr/libnr_common.a libUTIL.a libCONFIG_LIB.a common/utils/T/libT.a common/utils/LOG/libLOG.a common/utils/threadPool/libthread-pool.a common/utils/libutils.a common/utils/actor/libactor.a libUTIL.a libCONFIG_LIB.a common/utils/T/libT.a common/utils/LOG/libLOG.a common/utils/threadPool/libthread-pool.a common/utils/libutils.a common/utils/actor/libactor.a common/utils/barrier/libbarrier.a -lrt -lpthread -ldl
